title: Litosanthes cinerea
taxonomy: Litosanthes cinerea is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This classification reflects its close relationship to other plants in the Asteraceae family. Litosanthes cinerea is further classified as belonging to the tribe Inuleae, a group of flowering plants characterized by their daisy-like flowers. The genus Litosanthes is a small group of flowering plants native to the Philippines, with Litosanthes cinerea being one of the species within this genus. The classification of Litosanthes cinerea highlights its unique characteristics and relationships within the plant kingdom.
